full_text:
Xun Shuang (Ciming) 荀爽 (慈明)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xun Shuang (荀爽), styledCiming (慈明), was born in Yingchuan. Fast tracked by Dong Zhuo, he calmed Zhuo down when Yang Biao angered him. Xun Shuang was affiliated with the Han Dynasty and Dong Zhuo. Xun Shuang lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
